title: StandalonePriceImport
description: A single standalone price resource for import.

key.description: User-defined key for matching against existing prices.

sku.description: SKU of the product variant this price applies to.

value.description: The monetary value of the price.

customerGroup.description: Reference to the customer group scope.

validFrom.description: Start of the price validity period.

validUntil.description: End of the price validity period.
